narrative:
Beavercreek 029 (precinct in Greene County) has 663 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
